HSIN-HSIN YUAN
中

Documentary / Language / Creative Systems

Hsin-Hsin Yuan

Documentary Director/Cross-Cultural Storyteller/AI-Language Creative

I build human stories across documentary, culture, technology, and language. My work moves between film sets, interviews, platforms, and AI-assisted creative workflows.

Selected Impact

200M viewers for Top Gear China S02E05

Earlier English CV materials note the series had previously averaged 9M viewers.

#1 variety rating slot

The UK special set a 0.81 series rating record.

600K viewers in South India

The Tamil-language version of Overclocking was broadcast in South India.

NT$6M public funding secured

Funding records include Lying Game and Overclocking.

24 artist groups documented

My Art, My Voice and Taiwan in Motion documented Taiwan at the 2024 Paris Cultural Olympiad.

My Art, My Voice
2024-2025 / Lead Documentary Director / TaiwanPlus

My Art, My Voice

What I Build

Documentary films

Human stories with cultural and emotional precision.

Cross-cultural production

Taiwan, Shanghai, Europe, and international teams.

Technology stories

Founders, AI, deep tech, and the people behind systems.

AI-language workflows

Scripts, prompts, skills, and judgment systems.

AI / Language Lab

A living space for vibe coding, fact-checked short-form scripts, language judgment, and AI-assisted production workflows.

Codex x Claude writing room

Verified Series Script Workflow

A vibe-coding workflow for co-writing fact-checked short-form series scripts, originally developed for English teaching content and expandable to branded explainers.

Language, tone, culture

Documentary Listening for AI

A practice of judging speech by rhythm, intent, context, and whether a voice sounds human rather than generic.
